steps.title: Find section C probability
steps.content:
The probabilities for sections A, B, and C must add to $1$.
$$P(C)=1-0.35-0.30=0.35$$

steps.title: Convert probability to attendees
steps.content: Multiply the probability for section C by the total number of attendees. $$0.35(400)=140$$ The answer is D.
